steps.title: Identify the explicit goal
steps.content: The student wants to indicate WHERE the dicraeosaurid fossil was found. The answer must report the location from the notes: the Thar Desert in western India.

steps.title: Find the choice that names the location
steps.content: Only one choice actually states where the fossil was found. The correct answer says it was found in western Indias Thar Desert — pulled directly from the relevant note.

steps.title: Eliminate per choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — The dicraeosaurid fossil was found in western India's Thar Desert.: names the exact location from the notes; satisfies the goal. ✓
  • Choice B — Bajpai's team recently found the oldest dicraeosaurid fossil ever recovered.: describes the fossil's significance, not its location. Misses the goal. ✗
  • Choice C — Dr. Sunil Bajpai, of the Indian Institute of Technology, is part of a research team.: describes the researcher, not where the fossil was found. Misses the goal. ✗
  • Choice D — The fossil, which is from the dicraeosaurid dinosaur group, is 167 million years old.: gives the fossil's age, not its location. Misses the goal. ✗
That is the correct answer.
